version_description: Revised and simplified chord structure, capo retains song's original key.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
"I Knew I Loved You"
Performed by Savage Garden
Written by Darren Hayes & Daniel Jones


Capo 2

STRUMMING PATTERN AS LISTED ABOVE

PICKING PATTERN:

[tab]e ----| all chords except D        e ---------------| for D chord[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch] -----X------------------|        [ch]B[/ch] -----X----------------------|
[ch]G[/ch] -------X----------------|        [ch]G[/ch] ---X---X--------------------|
[ch]D[/ch] ---X--------------------|        [ch]D[/ch] -X--------------------------|
[ch]A[/ch] -X----------------------|        [ch]A[/ch] ----------------------------|
E ------------------------|        E ----------------------------|[/tab]


[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe it's intuition[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
But some things you just don't question[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Like in your eyes, I see my future in an instant[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
And there it goes, I think I've found my best friend[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I know that it might sound more than a little[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Crazy, but I believe...[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I think I dreamed you into life[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I have been waiting all my life[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
There's just no rhyme or reason[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Only this sense of completion[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And in your eyes, I see the missing pieces[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
I'm searching for, I think I found my way home[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I know that it might sound more than a little[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Crazy, but I believe...[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I think I dreamed you into life[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I have been waiting all my life[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
ooooh   ooh     aaaaah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
A thous-and ang-els dance a-round you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
ooooh   ooh     aaaaah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I am com-plete now that I've found you[/tab]

N.C
[Move to Capo 3]

D (strum - strum chords for rest of song)
